headline: Flash Flood Emergency — North Valley and South Flats — LIFE-THREATENING FLOODING OCCURRING
description: An Atmospheric River event has produced 4.5 inches of rain in the past 3 hours over the Sample County watershed. Flash flooding is actively occurring in North Valley (Zone A) and spreading into South Flats (Zone E). The North Valley creek gauge at Highway Bridge is at 28.5 feet and rising, above the 26-foot major flood stage. Water is flowing over road surfaces throughout Zone A. Multiple swift-water rescues are underway.
instruction: TURN AROUND, DON'T DROWN. Do not attempt to drive through flooded roads. If trapped by rising water, move to the highest floor of a sturdy building and call 911. This is a life-threatening situation — act immediately.
area_desc: Zone A (North Valley), Zone E (South Flats), portions of Zone B along the creek corridor

headline: North Valley Creek at Highway Bridge — 28.5 ft — Major Flood Stage exceeded
description: North Valley Creek at Highway Bridge gauge reading: 28.5 feet at 18:40 UTC, rising at 0.8 feet/hour. Major flood stage is 26.0 feet. At this rate, the 30-foot record stage may be reached in approximately 2 hours. Downstream impacts expected in low-lying residential areas of North Valley and South Flats within 1-3 hours.
instruction: Evacuate low-lying areas near North Valley Creek immediately. Do not wait for official orders if water is approaching your property.
area_desc: North Valley Creek corridor, Zones A and E downstream

headline: Flood Advisory — Urban and Small Stream flooding expected in remaining zones
description: Continued heavy rainfall of 1-2 inches is expected through 0200 UTC. Urban street flooding and ponding on low-lying roads is expected throughout Sample County. Storm drains are at capacity. Minor flooding in underpasses and low water crossings is likely.
instruction: Avoid driving through flooded underpasses and intersections. Allow extra travel time. Monitor conditions.
